name: Button
description: A versatile button component that can render as a link or button, with optional loading state, icon, and variant styles.

name: Project
description: Displays a project with a thumbnail, title, tech stack, description, and links to live demo and source code, with animations on hover.

name: SectionFlower
description: Renders an SVG flower icon with optional title and pattern fill.

name: SectionTitle
description: Displays a section title with an optional icon, customizable styles, and a default spinning flower icon if no icon is provided.

props.name: classNames
props.type: { container?: string; title?: string; icon?: string | undefined; } | undefined

name: TransitionLink
description: A React component that wraps a Next.js Link to add a GSAP animation transition before navigating to a new page or going back.
